title: Strange initialisation behaviour with "VinpClk" cloned clock variables

features.name: vinpclk cloned clock initialization with randReset
features.description: Code should include an always block with posedge clock and negedge derived signal in sensitivity list, combined with Verilated::randReset() call for random initialization
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin $display("%0d %0d", clk, rst_n); if (rst_n) begin end else begin end end
